sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Topa'n hong sem ding Lametna teng bei ciang in
Tel zawhloh ama zia tawh Topa'n kei hong hilh ding hi
Lam hong lak ding hi Aman'n hongompih den ding
Itna leh hehpihna tawh Anisim inah, Lam hong pi den ding.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Sehnel gamah kei hong tonpihin lam hong lak
Sehnel gam sung ciktui ka mu ta,
Van leh lei a mangthang zong
Tu ni-in thathak hong guan hi.
